items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you know my grandfather?
• Do you know my grand parents?
• Do you know my teacher?
• 1- How many brothers and sister do you have?
• 2- Do you prefer candy or chocolate?

items.text: Do you know my grand parents?

2- Do you prefer candy or chocolate?
